title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at dnata India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at dnata India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
dnata India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About dnata India South Asia Partners:
dnata India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India South Asia Partners!
